docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,000.00 FILED BY LOPEZ, LUIS AS TO DEFENDANT HEIM, CALVIN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-20-2013 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
